name: RAXI MUSIC
onCreateCommand: sudo apt-get update -qq && sudo apt-get install -y -qq ffmpeg && python3.11 -m venv /workspaces/raxi-music/venv && /workspaces/raxi-music/venv/bin/pip install -q --upgrade pip setuptools wheel && /workspaces/raxi-music/venv/bin/pip install -q --only-binary :all: ntgcalls && /workspaces/raxi-music/venv/bin/pip install -q -r /workspaces/raxi-music/requirements.txt && echo '✅ Setup selesai!'
